---
title: "Marketing Analytics"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<section class="page-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <p class="page-eyebrow">Data-Driven Strategy</p>
    <h1>Marketing Analytics</h1>
    <p class="page-subtitle">
      Case studies, data visualizations, and performance analysis — 
      turning behavioral data into strategic marketing decisions.
    </p>
  </div>
</section>

<div style="background:#faf8f5; padding:5rem 0;">
<div class="container">

<!-- FUNNEL ANALYSIS -->
<p class="section-eyebrow">Case Study · GA4 · Funnel Analysis · 2025</p>
<h2 class="section-title">Conversion Funnel Analysis: MEin3D Website Audit</h2>
<div class="section-divider"></div>

<p style="font-size:1rem; color:#4a4646; line-height:1.85; margin-bottom:2rem;">
As part of my graduate capstone project with MEin3D, I conducted a comprehensive conversion funnel 
analysis to identify where potential customers were dropping off before completing appointment bookings.
</p>

<!-- FUNNEL CHART (HTML/CSS) -->
<div style="background:#fff; border:1px solid #ede6df; padding:2rem; margin-bottom:1rem;">
  <p style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace; font-size:0.65rem; letter-spacing:0.2em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#b5785a; margin-bottom:1.5rem;">MEin3D Conversion Funnel — Illustrative Example</p>
  
  <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:0.75rem;">
    <div>
      <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">
        <span style="font-size:0.85rem; color:#2a2828;">Landing Page</span>
        <span style="font-size:0.85rem; color:#b5785a; font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;">1,000 visitors (100%)</span>
      </div>
      <div style="background:#e8d8cc; height:36px; width:100%;"></div>
    </div>
    <div>
      <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">
        <span style="font-size:0.85rem; color:#2a2828;">Services Page</span>
        <span style="font-size:0.85rem; color:#b5785a; font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;">640 visitors (64%)</span>
      </div>
      <div style="background:#d4a882; height:36px; width:64%;"></div>
    </div>
    <div>
      <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">
        <span style="font-size:0.85rem; color:#2a2828;">Pricing Page</span>
        <span style="font-size:0.85rem; color:#b5785a; font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;">380 visitors (38%)</span>
      </div>
      <div style="background:#c49078; height:36px; width:38%;"></div>
    </div>
    <div>
      <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">
        <span style="font-size:0.85rem; color:#2a2828;">Contact Form</span>
        <span style="font-size:0.85rem; color:#b5785a; font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;">190 visitors (19%)</span>
      </div>
      <div style="background:#b5785a; height:36px; width:19%;"></div>
    </div>
    <div>
      <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">
        <span style="font-size:0.85rem; color:#2a2828;">Submission ✓</span>
        <span style="font-size:0.85rem; color:#2a2828; font-family:'DM Mono',monospace; font-weight:500;">52 visitors (5.2%)</span>
      </div>
      <div style="background:#2a2828; height:36px; width:5.2%;"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <p style="font-size:0.7rem; color:#8c7b72; margin-top:1rem; font-style:italic;">* Illustrative data for educational purposes. Real client data kept confidential.</p>
</div>

<h3 style="font-size:1.2rem; margin-top:2.5rem; margin-bottom:0.75rem;">Key Drop-Off Points</h3>

<div class="row g-3 mb-4">
  <div class="col-sm-6 col-lg-3">
    <div class="metric-box">
      <div class="metric-num">36%</div>
      <div class="metric-label">Drop: Landing → Services</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="col-sm-6 col-lg-3">
    <div class="metric-box">
      <div class="metric-num">41%</div>
      <div class="metric-label">Drop: Services → Pricing</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="col-sm-6 col-lg-3">
    <div class="metric-box">
      <div class="metric-num">50%</div>
      <div class="metric-label">Drop: Pricing → Form</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="col-sm-6 col-lg-3">
    <div class="metric-box">
      <div class="metric-num">73%</div>
      <div class="metric-label">Drop: Form → Submit</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="pull-quote">
  "The biggest opportunity: recapture users who reached Pricing but didn't convert — 
  with the right message at the right moment."
</div>

<!-- EMAIL SEGMENTS -->
<h3 style="font-size:1.2rem; margin-top:2.5rem; margin-bottom:1rem;">AI Email Personalization — Projected Lift by Segment</h3>

<div style="background:#fff; border:1px solid #ede6df; padding:2rem; margin-bottom:2rem;">
  <p style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace; font-size:0.65rem; letter-spacing:0.2em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#b5785a; margin-bottom:1.5rem;">Estimated % Lift in Form Submissions</p>
  
  <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:1rem;">
    <div>
      <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">
        <span style="font-size:0.85rem; color:#2a2828;">Re-engagement (Bounced Users)</span>
        <span style="font-size:0.85rem; color:#b5785a; font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;">+31%</span>
      </div>
      <div style="background:#2a2828; height:28px; width:82%; display:flex; align-items:center; padding-left:0.75rem;">
        <span style="color:#faf8f5; font-size:0.75rem; font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;">+31%</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div>
      <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">
        <span style="font-size:0.85rem; color:#2a2828;">Personal Memorial</span>
        <span style="font-size:0.85rem; color:#b5785a; font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;">+24%</span>
      </div>
      <div style="background:#b5785a; height:28px; width:63%; display:flex; align-items:center; padding-left:0.75rem;">
        <span style="color:#faf8f5; font-size:0.75rem; font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;">+24%</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div>
      <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">
        <span style="font-size:0.85rem; color:#2a2828;">Gift Buyers</span>
        <span style="font-size:0.85rem; color:#b5785a; font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;">+18%</span>
      </div>
      <div style="background:#c49078; height:28px; width:48%; display:flex; align-items:center; padding-left:0.75rem;">
        <span style="color:#faf8f5; font-size:0.75rem; font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;">+18%</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div>
      <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">
        <span style="font-size:0.85rem; color:#2a2828;">Corporate Events</span>
        <span style="font-size:0.85rem; color:#b5785a; font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;">+15%</span>
      </div>
      <div style="background:#d4a882; height:28px; width:40%; display:flex; align-items:center; padding-left:0.75rem;">
        <span style="color:#2a2828; font-size:0.75rem; font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;">+15%</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="deco-rule">A/B Testing</div>

<!-- A/B TESTING -->
<p class="section-eyebrow">Methodology · Email Analytics</p>
<h2 class="section-title">A/B Testing Framework: Email Subject Lines</h2>
<div class="section-divider"></div>

<p style="font-size:1rem; color:#4a4646; line-height:1.85; margin-bottom:1.5rem;">
A/B testing is central to my email optimization approach. Below is the testing framework applied across campaigns at Miraco Beauty and Suntisfy.
</p>

<div style="background:#fff; border:1px solid #ede6df; overflow:hidden; margin-bottom:2rem;">
  <table style="width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; font-size:0.85rem;">
    <thead>
      <tr style="background:#2a2828; color:#faf8f5;">
        <th style="padding:0.85rem 1rem; text-align:left; font-weight:400; letter-spacing:0.05em;">Test</th>
        <th style="padding:0.85rem 1rem; text-align:center; font-weight:400;">Variant A</th>
        <th style="padding:0.85rem 1rem; text-align:center; font-weight:400;">Variant B</th>
        <th style="padding:0.85rem 1rem; text-align:center; font-weight:400;">Winner</th>
      </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #ede6df;">
        <td style="padding:0.85rem 1rem; color:#2a2828;">Personalized Name vs. Generic</td>
        <td style="padding:0.85rem 1rem; text-align:center; color:#8c7b72;">18.2%</td>
        <td style="padding:0.85rem 1rem; text-align:center; color:#8c7b72;">24.7%</td>
        <td style="padding:0.85rem 1rem; text-align:center; color:#b5785a; font-weight:500;">B ✓</td>
      </tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #ede6df; background:#faf8f5;">
        <td style="padding:0.85rem 1rem; color:#2a2828;">Urgency CTA vs. Soft CTA</td>
        <td style="padding:0.85rem 1rem; text-align:center; color:#8c7b72;">21.4%</td>
        <td style="padding:0.85rem 1rem; text-align:center; color:#8c7b72;">19.2%</td>
        <td style="padding:0.85rem 1rem; text-align:center; color:#b5785a; font-weight:500;">A ✓</td>
      </tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #ede6df;">
        <td style="padding:0.85rem 1rem; color:#2a2828;">Emoji in Subject vs. None</td>
        <td style="padding:0.85rem 1rem; text-align:center; color:#8c7b72;">19.8%</td>
        <td style="padding:0.85rem 1rem; text-align:center; color:#8c7b72;">22.3%</td>
        <td style="padding:0.85rem 1rem; text-align:center; color:#b5785a; font-weight:500;">B ✓</td>
      </tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #ede6df; background:#faf8f5;">
        <td style="padding:0.85rem 1rem; color:#2a2828;">Short Subject (&lt;40 chr) vs. Long</td>
        <td style="padding:0.85rem 1rem; text-align:center; color:#8c7b72;">24.1%</td>
        <td style="padding:0.85rem 1rem; text-align:center; color:#8c7b72;">20.8%</td>
        <td style="padding:0.85rem 1rem; text-align:center; color:#b5785a; font-weight:500;">A ✓</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td style="padding:0.85rem 1rem; color:#2a2828;">Benefit-Led vs. Product-Led</td>
        <td style="padding:0.85rem 1rem; text-align:center; color:#8c7b72;">17.6%</td>
        <td style="padding:0.85rem 1rem; text-align:center; color:#8c7b72;">23.4%</td>
        <td style="padding:0.85rem 1rem; text-align:center; color:#b5785a; font-weight:500;">B ✓</td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<div class="deco-rule">Social Performance</div>

<!-- SOCIAL CHART -->
<p class="section-eyebrow">Analytics · Instagram · TikTok</p>
<h2 class="section-title">Social Media Engagement Growth — Miraco Beauty</h2>
<div class="section-divider"></div>

<div style="background:#fff; border:1px solid #ede6df; padding:2rem; margin-bottom:2rem;">
  <p style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace; font-size:0.65rem; letter-spacing:0.2em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#b5785a; margin-bottom:0.5rem;">Monthly Engagement Rate (%)</p>
  <div style="display:flex; gap:1.5rem; margin-bottom:1.5rem;">
    <span style="font-size:0.75rem; color:#b5785a;">— Instagram</span>
    <span style="font-size:0.75rem; color:#2a2828;">– – TikTok</span>
  </div>
  
  <div style="display:flex; align-items:flex-end; gap:0.4rem; height:160px; border-bottom:1px solid #e0d5cd; border-left:1px solid #e0d5cd; padding:0 0.5rem;">
    <!-- Instagram bars -->
    <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; flex:1; gap:3px;">
      <div style="width:45%; background:#b5785a; height:34px;"></div>
      <div style="width:45%; background:#2a2828; opacity:0.3; height:54px; margin-top:-57px; margin-left:55%;"></div>
      <span style="font-size:0.6rem; color:#8c7b72; margin-top:3px;">Jan</span>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; flex:1; gap:3px;">
      <div style="width:45%; background:#b5785a; height:41px;"></div>
      <div style="width:45%; background:#2a2828; opacity:0.4; height:66px; margin-top:-69px; margin-left:55%;"></div>
      <span style="font-size:0.6rem; color:#8c7b72; margin-top:3px;">Feb</span>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; flex:1;">
      <div style="width:45%; background:#b5785a; height:44px;"></div>
      <div style="width:45%; background:#2a2828; opacity:0.5; height:79px; margin-top:-82px; margin-left:55%;"></div>
      <span style="font-size:0.6rem; color:#8c7b72; margin-top:3px;">Mar</span>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; flex:1;">
      <div style="width:45%; background:#b5785a; height:42px;"></div>
      <div style="width:45%; background:#2a2828; opacity:0.55; height:86px; margin-top:-89px; margin-left:55%;"></div>
      <span style="font-size:0.6rem; color:#8c7b72; margin-top:3px;">Apr</span>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; flex:1;">
      <div style="width:45%; background:#b5785a; height:56px;"></div>
      <div style="width:45%; background:#2a2828; opacity:0.6; height:99px; margin-top:-102px; margin-left:55%;"></div>
      <span style="font-size:0.6rem; color:#8c7b72; margin-top:3px;">May</span>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; flex:1;">
      <div style="width:45%; background:#b5785a; height:52px;"></div>
      <div style="width:45%; background:#2a2828; opacity:0.65; height:92px; margin-top:-95px; margin-left:55%;"></div>
      <span style="font-size:0.6rem; color:#8c7b72; margin-top:3px;">Jun</span>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; flex:1;">
      <div style="width:45%; background:#b5785a; height:59px;"></div>
      <div style="width:45%; background:#2a2828; opacity:0.7; height:109px; margin-top:-112px; margin-left:55%;"></div>
      <span style="font-size:0.6rem; color:#8c7b72; margin-top:3px;">Jul</span>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; flex:1;">
      <div style="width:45%; background:#b5785a; height:66px;"></div>
      <div style="width:45%; background:#2a2828; opacity:0.75; height:122px; margin-top:-125px; margin-left:55%;"></div>
      <span style="font-size:0.6rem; color:#8c7b72; margin-top:3px;">Aug</span>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; flex:1;">
      <div style="width:45%; background:#b5785a; height:63px;"></div>
      <div style="width:45%; background:#2a2828; opacity:0.8; height:116px; margin-top:-119px; margin-left:55%;"></div>
      <span style="font-size:0.6rem; color:#8c7b72; margin-top:3px;">Sep</span>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; flex:1;">
      <div style="width:45%; background:#b5785a; height:69px;"></div>
      <div style="width:45%; background:#2a2828; opacity:0.85; height:134px; margin-top:-137px; margin-left:55%;"></div>
      <span style="font-size:0.6rem; color:#8c7b72; margin-top:3px;">Oct</span>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; flex:1;">
      <div style="width:45%; background:#b5785a; height:78px;"></div>
      <div style="width:45%; background:#2a2828; opacity:0.9; height:141px; margin-top:-144px; margin-left:55%;"></div>
      <span style="font-size:0.6rem; color:#8c7b72; margin-top:3px;">Nov</span>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; flex:1;">
      <div style="width:45%; background:#b5785a; height:74px;"></div>
      <div style="width:45%; background:#2a2828; height:138px; margin-top:-141px; margin-left:55%;"></div>
      <span style="font-size:0.6rem; color:#8c7b72; margin-top:3px;">Dec</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <p style="font-size:0.7rem; color:#8c7b72; margin-top:1rem; font-style:italic;">* Illustrative data. Actual brand performance data kept confidential.</p>
</div>

<!-- TOOLS -->
<div class="deco-rule">Tools & Methods</div>
<div class="skills-grid">
  <div class="skill-block">
    <div class="skill-label">Analytics Platforms</div>
    <div class="skill-items">Google Analytics 4 · BigQuery · Meta Business Suite · TikTok Analytics</div>
  </div>
  <div class="skill-block">
    <div class="skill-label">Programming & Visualization</div>
    <div class="skill-items">R · ggplot2 · Tableau · Quarto</div>
  </div>
  <div class="skill-block">
    <div class="skill-label">Email Analytics</div>
    <div class="skill-items">Open Rate · CTR · A/B Testing · Segmentation · Revenue Attribution</div>
  </div>
  <div class="skill-block">
    <div class="skill-label">Analysis Methods</div>
    <div class="skill-items">Funnel Analysis · Cohort Analysis · Regression · A/B Testing · Attribution Modeling</div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
</div>
```
